Alert.name: Alert
Alert.level1: Gain Notice. Avoid surprise and execution attacks, and roll initiative twice.
Alert.level2: Act first unless another participant is equally alert.

Armsman.name: Armsman
Armsman.description: Training with melee and thrown weapons.
Armsman.level1: Gain Stab. Ready melee or thrown weapons quickly and add Stab to damage or Shock.
Armsman.level2: Primitive melee and thrown weapons overcome advanced armor better; melee misses still deal minor damage.

Assassin.name: Assassin
Assassin.level1: Gain Sneak. Hide a small weapon from routine detection and point-blank surprise shots cannot miss.
Assassin.level2: Move as part of an execution attack before and after the strike.

Authority.name: Authority
Authority.level1: Gain Lead. NPCs are more likely to accept orders when the situation supports it.
Authority.level2: Once per scene, turn a willing ally's failed morale or mental-pressure check into success.

Close Combatant.name: Close Combatant
Close Combatant.level1: Gain any combat skill. Ignore most penalties for fighting in cramped or chaotic melee range.
Close Combatant.level2: Prevent adjacent foes from easily withdrawing and improve close-range threat control.

Connected.name: Connected
Connected.level1: Gain Connect. Find contacts or useful introductions in plausible places.
Connected.level2: Call in stronger favors, introductions, or local help once per session.

Die Hard.name: Die Hard
Die Hard.level1: Gain extra maximum hit points every level and stabilize automatically from most mortal wounds.
Die Hard.level2: Once per day, remain at one hit point instead of dropping to zero from most injuries.

Diplomat.name: Diplomat
Diplomat.level1: Gain Talk. Speak common sector languages and reroll 1s on diplomacy checks.
Diplomat.level2: Once per session, improve an intelligent NPC's reaction after brief conversation.

Gunslinger.name: Gunslinger
Gunslinger.level1: Gain Shoot. Ready ranged weapons quickly and add Shoot to ranged damage.
Gunslinger.level2: Reload quickly once per round and deal minor damage even on missed Shoot attacks.

Hacker.name: Hacker
Hacker.level1: Gain Program. Roll 3d6 and drop the lowest die for hacking attempts.
Hacker.level2: Extend hack duration and adapt quickly to unfamiliar systems.

Healer.name: Healer
Healer.level1: Gain Heal. Improve mundane medical care and post-combat treatment.
Healer.level2: Restore more damage with medical attention and handle severe injuries better.

Henchkeeper.name: Henchkeeper
Henchkeeper.description: Recruitment and management of loyal helpers.
Henchkeeper.level1: Gain Lead. Maintain a small group of useful followers.
Henchkeeper.level2: Followers become more capable, reliable, and numerous.

Ironhide.name: Ironhide
Ironhide.level1: Gain an innate armor class based on level that does not stack with worn armor.
Ironhide.level2: Ignore unarmed attacks and primitive weaponry as if protected by advanced armor.

Savage Fray.name: Savage Fray
Savage Fray.level1: Gain Stab. Adjacent enemies you did not attack can suffer your weapon's Shock damage.
Savage Fray.level2: After the first melee hit each round, other melee attackers automatically miss.

Shocking Assault.name: Shocking Assault
Shocking Assault.level1: Gain Punch or Stab. Your weapon's Shock treats targets as AC 10 when it can harm them.
Shocking Assault.level2: Increase Shock damage and make nearby enemies suffer more from your attacks.

Sniper.name: Sniper
Sniper.description: Precision fire from concealment or distance.
Sniper.level1: Gain Shoot. Improve accuracy and lethality for carefully aimed ranged attacks.
Sniper.level2: Make aimed shots more dangerous and harder for targets to survive.

Specialist.name: Specialist
Specialist.description: Exceptional competence with one non-combat skill.
Specialist.level1: Gain a non-combat skill. Roll 3d6 and drop the lowest die with that skill.
Specialist.level2: Once per scene, reroll a failed check with the specialized skill.

Star Captain.name: Star Captain
Star Captain.level1: Gain Lead. Improve shipboard command and crew coordination.
Star Captain.level2: Once per scene, improve an allied ship action through command.

Starfarer.name: Starfarer
Starfarer.level1: Gain Pilot. Handle common shipboard hazards and spacer tasks more reliably.
Starfarer.level2: React better to ship emergencies and difficult space travel problems.

Tinker.name: Tinker
Tinker.level1: Gain Fix. Maintain more mods and reduce ship and gear mod costs.
Tinker.level2: Treat Fix as higher for mods and reduce advanced mod salvage needs.

Unarmed Combatant.name: Unarmed Combatant
Unarmed Combatant.level1: Gain Punch. Improve unarmed damage by Punch level and gain Shock at Punch-1 or better.
Unarmed Combatant.level2: Unarmed attacks count as advanced weapons and missed Punch attacks still deal minor damage.

Unique Gift.name: Unique Gift
Unique Gift.description: A GM-approved unusual aptitude or capability.
Unique Gift.level1: Define a special ability with the GM that is stronger than ordinary training but limited in scope.
Unique Gift.level2: Improve or broaden the approved special ability with GM consent.

Wanderer.name: Wanderer
Wanderer.level1: Gain Survive. Travel safely and adapt to hostile environments more easily.
Wanderer.level2: Protect companions and handle extreme travel hazards more reliably.
